description_long: This object appears to be a highly abstract or low-detail representation of a pedestrian adult, with angular and faceted surfaces that do not clearly define anatomical features. The form is blocky and geometric, lacking visible limbs, facial features, or clothing details. The surface is smooth and has a uniform, matte finish, with subtle shading suggesting a single material throughout. There are no visible accessories, carried items, or distinguishing marks. The overall silhouette is monolithic, with no clear separation between body parts. The object is rendered in a neutral, grayish tone, and does not display any realistic human characteristics.
description: A blocky, abstract pedestrian adult form with smooth, matte surfaces and no visible anatomical or clothing details.
description_view_0: Angular, faceted surfaces with a deep crease or fold visible; no discernible human features.
description_view_1: Flat, smooth surface with minimal detail; no anatomical features visible.
description_view_2: Another flat, featureless surface, possibly a side or back; lacks any human definition.
description_view_3: Very dark, almost featureless view, with only a faint outline of the form visible.
attribute_clothing_type: undefined abstract form, no visible clothing details
